artifacts.label: Gap decision ledger
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr reports gap-ledger --repo-exposure target/ripr/reports/repo-exposure.json --out inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out-md inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.md

artifacts.label: PR repair cards
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr review-comments --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/output-contract-gap --base origin/main --head HEAD --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out target/ripr/review/comments.json

artifacts.label: Agent repair packet
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr agent packet --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/output-contract-gap --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --gap-id gap:pr:output:device-label --json > target/ripr/workflow/agent-packet.json

artifacts.label: Gate decision
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr gate evaluate --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out target/ripr/reports/gate-decision.json --out-md target/ripr/reports/gate-decision.md

authority.boundary: Pass/fail authority remains with explicit gate-decision artifacts when configured; this first-run packet does not gate.

commands.agent_packet: ripr agent packet --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/output-contract-gap --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --gap-id gap:pr:output:device-label --json > target/ripr/workflow/agent-packet.json
commands.regenerate_gap_ledger: ripr reports gap-ledger --repo-exposure target/ripr/reports/repo-exposure.json --out inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out-md inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.md

limits: Does not edit source or generate tests.
Does not change CI blocking or gate policy.

selected.agent_packet_command: ripr agent packet --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/output-contract-gap --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --gap-id gap:pr:output:device-label --json > target/ripr/workflow/agent-packet.json
selected.receipt_unavailable_reason: No receipt command was supplied by the gap ledger; run the verify command first, then regenerate first-pr after an agent receipt command is available.

repair.focused_proof_intent: Add or update the device-label golden output so the visible label is checked.

selected.why: User-facing output changed, but the gap ledger did not find checked output or golden evidence for the changed text.
